title: Parishes authorized to aid in construction of schools
doc_html:
§100.  Parishes authorized to aid in construction of schools

The governing authorities of the several parishes may appropriate available parish funds to aid the school boards of their respective parishes, with the consent of the said boards, in the construction and operation of parish public schools.
doc_text:
§100.  Parishes authorized to aid in construction of schools
The governing authorities of the several parishes may appropriate available parish funds to aid the school boards of their respective parishes, with the consent of the said boards, in the construction and operation of parish public schools.
